subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O Sovereign of existence and Ruler of the seen and unseen! I beseech Thee by the Name through which was cleft asunder [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک یا سلطان الوجود و مالک الغیب و الشهود اسئلک بالاسم الذی به انفطرت
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Greatest Name
